prompt: Design a surreal travel-themed collage using an airplane image from image 1 and pastel cloudscape from image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a surreal travel-themed collage artwork. Prominently feature the vintage brown silhouette airplane from image 1, flying through a whimsical sky. This sky should be composed of the soft, painted pastel clouds (blues, whites, greys) and the warm golden-tan background texture derived from image 2. The final image should embody a dreamlike, collaged aesthetic, blending the distinct visual styles of both references.
objects: soft, painted pastel clouds (blues, whites, greys)
